title: In The Corners (horror)
description: In The Corners, a Minecraft mod that will terrify you. This mod adds 43 stalking, seeking and killing entities to your world.
body:
---------------------------------------------------------------------
This mod requires geckolib to work.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bgL2ViV8tKo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
If you want to stay up to date with this or any of my other mods please join the discord down below.



DONT PLAY ON SERVERS WITH THIS MOD, ESSENTIAL IS OKAY.
I will not be fixing this as it will require too many changes to the main mod, and multiplayer is still accessible via essential.


Thank you to Alexander25 and SpicyGlitch for some help with the mod.

[Official YT](https://www.youtube.com/@InTheCorners)

Official In The Corners discord server

[Official discord server](https://discord.gg/9TwTnJDD3K)

Dualfusion studios, features this mod and other awesome mods

https://discord.gg/eBZAKjPSKE
---------------------------
QnA

Q 1.19.2 Version?: A: nah, probably not, risks the workspace.

Q 1.21.1 Version?: A: again, i would have to compile a whole bunch of shi which may risk the workspace.

IMPORTANT FROM 5.0 AND ABOVE: ENTITY SPAWNING IS FIXED!

spawning now works on a delay which you can config, ussually, entities spawn every 4000 ticks but if you don't like that, you can always customize it to your preference



This mod has a config, You should use the configured mod to find it in the main menu.
---------------------------
What are the entites?

In The Corners adds 43 Entities that will roam your world, stalk, watch and kill you.
---------------------------
What's the entity hierarchy?

Tier one

Tier one entities are known as the stalkers or manipulators. They are basic and easy to understand, hence tier one.

Tier two

Tier two entities are known as the creators, they have sophisticated AI and are almost unpredeictable. They take a player form and are easy to tell apart from normal entities.

Tier three

Tier three entities are known as the entities from the abyss. They serve progression post vainglory and are more complicated to escape and figure out. Like, buffed versions of normal entities.

Tier four

Tier four entities are the bosses of this mod. These include: Speech, Providence, Vainglory and Void. They are the most powerful beings and lore impacted story tellers of the mod.
---------------------------
Tier one - entities

Hide--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Hide likes to play games with you. Hide will either try to convince you to come over to him or he will want to play a game of hide and seek. (you will have to find him.)

</details>



 

Shadow--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You should see shadow as a warning. he poses small threat. he will stand still or walk towards you.


</details>


Stalk--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Stalk is an entity simillar to hide's stalking phase. he will dissapear and reappear closer to you.

</details>



Glitch--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Glitch may not harm you if he is in his glitching phase, his glitching will be very annoying.

</details>



Name.err--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Name.err is completely harmless. It will only try to INFECT your world with err.name.blocks.

</details>



Scatter--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Scatter is very dangerous, he will shoot projectiles in all directions. these projectiles will jumpscare you on contact

</details>



Anonymous--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Anonymous will speak to you, then he will start chasing you with a piercing scream.

</details>



Eyes--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You'll know when eyes is hunting you. A loud sound followed up with a jumpscare will play at whenever time he spawns.

</details>



Observe--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Observe will either observe you from a distance, stalk you, or run at you.

</details>



Integer--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Integer will play a realistic door knocking noise, and then blare a loud bass sound. Once the bass is over, Integer will spawn near the nearest player and will chase them. On contact, the Integer will transport the player to a new creepy dimension.


</details>


Excruciate--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Excruciate is one of the most deadliest entities besides anonymous. Excruciate will black out the screen on spawn and will slowly approach the player.


</details>


Watching--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Watching is always watching

</details>



Root--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Root is basically name.err but can't move.

</details>


Glare--

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Glare doesn't like to be looked at, do not stare directly.

</details>


Whisper--

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Whisper always knows where you are, and is not frightened by your gaze.

</details>

Disgrace--

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Disgrace will stop and stare from far away, just dont get too close to her or she will chase you down.

</details>


Corrupted--

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

find.me.in.the.corrupted.chunks.

</details>


Lurker--

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Wandering in the maze for years.

</details>


Trapped--

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Trapped in the endlessly twisting pathways.

</details>


Tier two - creators

Pseudo--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Pseudo will constantly walk towards you like void does.

</details>



Unknown--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Unknown will constantly walk towards you like pseudo does.

</details>



Agony--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Agony will constantly walk towards you like pseudo does.

</details>



Watcher--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Watcher will act the exact same way agony does, but will transport you to a harder dimension.

</details>



Overseer--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Overseer is just like the other creators except he will rapidly run towards you, eventually getting close enough to trigger a chase, like all other entities.


</details>


Delusion--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Delusion will constantly walk towards the player, just like all creators. When colliding with Delusion, he will teleport the player in a random spot with a 16x16 radius.


</details>


Misfortune--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Misfortune will act like all other creators but when in collision, will constantly damage the player.

</details>



Vacant--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Vacant only has a void appearence, and is quite unusual, despite being somewhat common in the abyss era.

</details>



Beholder--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Beholder is an interesting entity and he is a little complicated. He will approach you at all times unless in a 5 block radius, he will stop and stare.


</details>


Abomination--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

???

</details>



Tier three - entities from the abyss

Void--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Void will always know where you are. Void will actively walk towards you at any cost but slowly. Trees nearby 5 blocks of void will have their leaves destroyed.


</details>


Abyss--




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Abyss will act just like void, and he has 2 different behaviours. Both behaviours constantly walk to the player. Behaviour one will jumpscare the player on contact and chase them after. Behaviour two will jumpscare the player, then kick them from the world.


</details>




Alternate--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Alternate will act just like stalk, just a little faster.


</details>


legacy--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Legacy will act just like void but more unpredictable and fast.


</details>


Reverse--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Reverse will act just like anonymous but faster, slimmer and agile.

</details>




</details>


Shapeshifter--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Shapeshifter lives up to it's name, it will take the form of an ordinary mob just with a tweak to the eyes, also, you may find shapeshifter stalking you.


</details>


Stress--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Stress is just like eyes but will restrict gravity.

</details>



Despair--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Despair acts like observe but deadlier.

</details>



Remorse--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Remorse is a big entity with an ability to summon lightling


</details>


Illusion--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Illusion won't kill you, he will have you face your fears.

</details>



Manipulate--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Manipulate has a weeping angel kind of effect

</details>



Descry--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Descry is like a mini reverse, he will constantly run at full speed towards you.


</details>


Controlled--




<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Contolled will stop and stare at you in a 16 block radius, don't get too close to him.

</details>



Tier four - bosses

Speech--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Speech will give you a speech about how this all happened and lore and how this is all your fault in his very own lore dimension, only found by discovering secret ways in via the err blocks or the shadow/soul dimensions.

</details>



Vainglory--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Vainglory will come down from the moon, prepared to take you down. Once you stop him, your world is free.

</details>

Vestige--

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Vestige is summonable by the player, it is recommended to fight him after beating speech

</details>


Void--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Void, in his boss phase will tell you whats been the truth all along, confronting you, triggering a semi-cutscene whenever you enter his dimension.


</details>


Providence--


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Providence malfunctions in the error dimensions. This will make her unstable and unable to keep herself hidden from the player, resulting in the player having to free her from the corruption.

</details>
